* [Weinan Sports Center Stadium](/wiki/Weinan_Sports_Center_Stadium "Weinan Sports Center Stadium") (2023, 2024–2025) * Shaanxi Province Stadium (2024) * [Xi'an International Football Center](/wiki/Xi%27an_International_Football_Center "Xi'an International Football Center") (2026–present)

This article about a [China](/wiki/China "China") [sports venue](/wiki/Sports_venue "Sports venue") is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Shaanxi_Province_Stadium&action=edit).

([Chinese](/wiki/Simplified_Chinese_characters "Simplified Chinese characters"): 陕西省体育场), also known as **Zhuque Stadium** ([Chinese](/wiki/Simplified_Chinese_characters "Simplified Chinese characters"): 朱雀体育场)[[2]](#cite_note-2) because it is located near Zhuque Square (朱雀广场), is a multi-use [stadium](/wiki/Stadium "Stadium") in [Xi'an](/wiki/Xi%27an "Xi'an"), [China](/wiki/China "China"). It is used mainly for [football](/wiki/Football_(soccer) "Football (soccer)") matches and [athletics](/wiki/Sport_of_athletics "Sport of athletics") events. The stadium had a capacity of 50,100 people,[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*] but a renovation in 2020 reduced it to 43,000.[[3]](#cite_note-c-3) It was named **Coca-Cola Stadium** ([Chinese](/wiki/Simplified_Chinese_characters "Simplified Chinese characters"): 可口可乐体育场) from 2005 to 2007.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

["官方：陕西联合主场分阶段设在省体育场、西安国际足球中心"](https://www.dongqiudi.com/articles/4046650.html) [Official: Shaanxi Union's home will be split into stages at the Shaanxi Province Stadium and at the Xi'an International Football Center] (in Chinese). Dongqiudi. 20 February 2024. Retrieved 20 February 2024.
["省体育场改建工程全面启动 浐灞主场将移师宝鸡-搜狐体育"](http://sports.sohu.com/20080110/n254570449.shtml). *sports.sohu.com*.

["陕西省体育场 - 西部网（陕西新闻网）"](https://web.archive.org/web/20231203221302/http://m.cnwest.com/sxxw/a/2020/08/07/18984616.html). Archived from [the original](http://m.cnwest.com/sxxw/a/2020/08/07/18984616.html) on 2023-12-03. Retrieved 2023-11-30.

**Shaanxi Province Stadium** ([Chinese](/wiki/Simplified_Chinese_characters "Simplified Chinese characters"): 陕西省体育场), also known as **Zhuque Stadium** ([Chinese](/wiki/Simplified_Chinese_characters "Simplified Chinese characters"): 朱雀体育场)[[2]](#cite_note-2) because it is located near Zhuque Square (朱雀广场), is a multi-use [stadium](/wiki/Stadium "Stadium") in [Xi'an](/wiki/Xi%27an "Xi'an"), [China](/wiki/China "China"). It is used mainly for [football](/wiki/Football_(soccer) "Football (soccer)") matches and [athletics](/wiki/Sport_of_athletics "Sport of athletics") events. The stadium had a capacity of 50,100 people,[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*] but a renovation in 2020 reduced it to 43,000.[[3]](#cite_note-c-3) It was named **Coca-Cola Stadium** ([Chinese](/wiki/Simplified_Chinese_characters "Simplified Chinese characters"): 可口可乐体育场) from 2005 to 2007.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]
